properties.name: sloth.web.response-wrapper
properties.description: Whether to wrap controller responses with R.

properties.name: sloth.web.xss-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable XSS filter for servlet requests.

properties.name: sloth.web.xss-exclude-urls
properties.description: Request paths excluded from the XSS filter.

properties.name: sloth.web.cors.allow-credentials
properties.description: Whether to allow credentials for CORS.

properties.name: sloth.web.cors.max-age
properties.description: Max age for CORS preflight cache.
